meaning: n.理念,理性,圣子,(基督教教义中)与神同一的道
examples: Some companies think changing logos can prevent the spread of COVID. The following logo change of Coca Cola is to show social distancing.
It refers to staying away from crowded places to prevent the spread of COVID-19. Some companies are taking advantages of this by changing their logos.
The couple have opened a small shop in Beijing, where they use wood products to take the place of plastic ones and cloth bags printed with environmentally friendly logos.
The UFC site also was hacked again, with Anonymous logos briefly appearing on its main page.
The Sharp FX Plus sports earSmart logos on its box and marketing materials, for example.
